options.label: A
options.text: The total amount of force applied to an object

options.label: B
options.text: The force applied per unit area

options.label: C
options.text: The weight of an object divided by its mass

options.label: D
options.text: The distance a force travels over time

explanation: Pressure is defined as force per unit area. It shows how concentrated a force is over a surface. The formula is: Pressure = Force ÷ Area.
